title: carex mollicula
intro: Carex mollicula, also known as the woolly sedge, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the sedge family. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex mollicula include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and aid in digestion, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Carex mollicula can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and its rhizomes and roots are often used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
